case_title: YUSIM, ALEXANDER VS COUNTY OF SACRAMENTO

docket_entries.description: DEFT WAIVED IMMUNITY. SEE 4/28/00 LETTER TO PLTF ATTACHED TO CLAIM AND DECLARATION ATTACHED AS PART OF EXHIBIT G SUBMITTED BY DEFT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ANY AUTH.AGENT -CO.OF SACRAMENTO RETURNED SIGNED;
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-03-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-27-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YUSIM, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COUNTY OF SACRAMENTO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,526.00, DEFT WAIVED IMMUNITY. SEE REMARKS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,075.00 FILED BY YUSIM, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT COUNTY OF SACRAMENTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2000 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CON'T REQUEST FILED BY DEFT COUNTY OF SACTO. BY COREY LOCKETT SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.
